title: Cabal Warchief battles twice with one return attack

card.rawText: This creature may initiate battle twice during your turn. Your opponent can only return attack for 1 of these battles. This creature cannot change control, or be removed from the field unless killed.

effect.value: This creature may initiate battle twice during your turn. Your opponent can only return attack for 1 of these battles. This creature cannot change control, or be removed from the field unless killed.
